Delhi School of Journalism (University of Delhi) is inviting applications from eligible candidates for the empanelment of Assistant Professors (Guest Basis) for the Academic Session 2026–27 to facilitate bilingual (Hindi & English) teaching-learning.

Total Vacancy: Journalism & Mass Communication: 16
Programmes: Five-Year Integrated Programme in Journalism (FYIPJ) and Master of Journalism (MJ) under the NEP.

Application Link: https://lnkd.in/dWPtwxCn
Application must reach through Google Form by July 05, 2026.

Read the details of advertisement👇
https://lnkd.in/dt2T6cUE
